plan.title: Installable workflow control plane
plan.goal: Install and execute an auditable Issue workflow without copying a template repository.

requirements.title: Install only the control-plane surface
requirements.behavior: The initializer installs the configuration, plan directory, planning skill, and reusable-workflow caller needed by a target repository.
boundaries: Existing repository structure and instruction files remain owned by the target repository.
exceptions: A byte-identical existing file is treated as already installed.
A conflicting file stops initialization unless replacement was explicitly requested.
unacceptableBehavior: Copying the complete kit repository into the target repository.

acceptanceCriteria.statement: Initialization creates only the declared install surface and preserves unrelated files.

requirements.title: Reject untraceable execution evidence
requirements.behavior: Every task, acceptance result, verification result, and final evidence record identifies the requirement it proves.
boundaries: Evidence is accepted only for the immutable task envelope.
exceptions: A blocked result may explain missing evidence but cannot be treated as completion.
unacceptableBehavior: Treating natural-language completion claims as structured evidence.
Changing requirements or allowed paths after plan approval.

acceptanceCriteria.statement: Completion is rejected when requirement-linked acceptance or verification evidence is missing.

epics.title: Deliver the installable control plane
epics.goal: Provide installation and traceable execution as one approved delivery sequence.
epics.value: Repositories can adopt the workflow with a small, auditable footprint.
epics.context: The v1 workflow is remotely referenced but is not installed or automatically orchestrated.
epics.expectedBehavior: Two serial tasks install and validate the control plane.

acceptanceCriteria.statement: The install and evidence tasks complete serially.

tasks.title: Install the minimum target surface
tasks.value: Adopters receive only the files needed to call the kit.
tasks.context: There is no install command in v1.
tasks.expectedBehavior: Initialization writes the declared files and stops on conflicts.
scope: Create configuration, plan directory, skill, and workflow caller.

acceptanceCriteria.statement: Initialization creates only the declared install surface and preserves unrelated files.

tasks.title: Validate requirement-linked evidence
tasks.goal: Reject incomplete or untraceable completion records.
tasks.value: Every merge can be replayed back to its approved requirement.
tasks.context: v1 evidence identifies acceptance runs but not stable requirement IDs.
tasks.expectedBehavior: Completion validates plan, envelope, commit, paths, tests, and requirement evidence together.
scope: Define v2 envelope and completion schemas.

acceptanceCriteria.statement: Completion is rejected when requirement-linked acceptance or verification evidence is missing.
